commands.review_summary:
The PR rolls automatic model fallback overrides back after successful attempts, preserves selected session routing while recording actual fallback usage, and updates fallback docs, status/accounting tests, and the changelog.

Reproducibility: yes. by source inspection: current main documents/tests persistent auto fallback overrides, and session usage persistence writes the actual runtime provider/model into session routing. I did not run a live current-main repro in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: Manual review is needed because the remaining blocker is the fallback recovery and upgrade-safety policy choice, not a narrow mechanical repair.
